title: IMA EVA Free Magazine About Evangelion
display_title: IMA EVA Free Magazine About Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: IMA-EVA Free Magazine About Evangelion             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Thu Jul 26, 2012 7:42 am http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/rss_det.cgi?news_c=11217&newsctg_c=1001 Volume 01 to be distributed on the 28th?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Jul 26, 2012 7:56 am Shut and take my money for postage and packaging charges as well as import tax!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 26, 2012 10:26 am If I'm understanding right, it's the same thing as EVA EXTRA (which was the Free Paper for Eva 2.0), just with a different style. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1699.html http://room666.blog49.fc2.com/blog-entry-5744.html And yeah, it's going to be distributed on July 28th.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Jul 26, 2012 12:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And yeah, it's going to be disturbed on July 28th.

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Sat Jul 28, 2012 12:59 am Is it out yet? I want pictures! Pictures of Spidereva!

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Jul 28, 2012 9:15 am Sorry, couldn't help but think of how the title of the magazine is presented. IMA EVA! IMA AT-FIELD! IMA NOT RUNNING AWAY! IMA PUSSY OUT DURING THE INSTRUMENTALITY PROJECT! ... Must've went overboard just now. (ahem) ... Can't stop thinking about the title! (Curse you, idiotic internet!)

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Sat Jul 28, 2012 3:58 pm Anybody find scans yet?? It's technically Sunday over there so...

[]:             Quote Post by michalek10866 » Sun Jul 29, 2012 6:53 pm Is there anyone who has found scans ??

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Sun Jul 29, 2012 9:35 pm Someone posted some images of it here: http://xxx2015.blog.fc2.com/blog-entry-79.html But, it's not very interesting. There's no new information or images, and it seems to mostly be some info about the premiere + advertisements for other products and events.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun Jul 29, 2012 9:43 pm Evangelion back to school sale, now at Target! 30% off all Kaworu stripey shirts!

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sun Jul 29, 2012 9:45 pm 1731298478 wrote: Someone posted some images of it here: http://xxx2015.blog.fc2.com/blog-entry-79.html But, it's not very interesting. There's no new information or images, and it seems to mostly be some info about the premiere + advertisements for other products and events.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jul 29, 2012 11:08 pm They've got one of the most anticipated films in Japan. After a TV series, three different movies (4 if you count 'Death & Rebirth') & being a part of the culture in Japan for almost 20 years if people like they'll go see it in theaters. They don't really need to sell it to anyone, people have already made their mind and are going to go or not. All Khara has to do is make people aware the film is coming.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Jul 30, 2012 4:25 am Yeah, what could they say to skeptics? "Come see the first half of the last half of the series you've skipped 50% of!" In a world where "The Amazing Spider-Man" releases 20 minutes of clips, I'm loving the dark. It's not "shameful" to let the movie reveal the story, it's how things are supposed to be!

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Mon Jul 30, 2012 6:59 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: three different movies (4 if you count 'Death & Rebirth')

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon Jul 30, 2012 7:09 am Warren Peace wrote: It's not "shameful" to let the movie reveal the story, it's how things are supposed to be!

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Mon Jul 30, 2012 2:24 pm There's plenty of marketing and advance advertising going on. Just not what's typically expected.

[]:             Quote Post by Glif » Wed Aug 01, 2012 6:53 am The rest of the magazine. just post the perma-links to the images, links to 4chan are useless Use the archive when it goes down.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 08, 2012 3:32 pm Volume 2 distributed on November 9th: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1882.html Kaworu on the cover this time. Wonder if this issue will actually include articles or trailer image break-downs instead of the advertisements that volume 1 had.

[]:             Quote Post by FluffyBunny » Thu Nov 08, 2012 4:03 pm Well I understand Kaworu is going to be at the center of the story, but there is too much Kaworu so far (well, I mean, too much for me anyway). Put Rei or Asuka on the cover for a change! (Thanks for the info, Sailer Star Dust by the way.) *Edit* Heck, I forgot the first one had Asuka already. Please ignore me. I'm sorry. I will go back to my cave.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Nov 08, 2012 4:05 pm FluffyBunny wrote: Put Rei or Asuka on the cover for a change!
